texto: But all those weeks with Nate, however fake they might have been, did do one thing for me. Whether the rest of world saw me that way, I knew now that I was strong, and I was beautiful, just the way I was. And girls like me needed gorgeous clothes too.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alessandra Thomas: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “But all those weeks with Nate, however fake they might have been, did do one thing for me. Whethe…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, beauty, clothes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de clothes e self-worth.

frase_original: But all those weeks with Nate, however fake they might have been, did do one thing for me. Whether the rest of world saw me that way, I knew now that I was strong, and I was beautiful, just the way I was. And girls like me needed gorgeous clothes too.
